name: gitswarm
description: GitHub issue, PR, and agent dashboard for managing AI work across repositories.

scripts.prepack: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: python3 -m py_compile ./dashboard.py ./server.py ./github.py ./backend/*.py && npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix web run build && bash -n ./orchestrate.sh && node --check ./bin/gitswarm.js && bash ./scripts/test-repo-arg.sh && bash ./scripts/test-init-doctor.sh
